message:
test(extension-host): add comprehensive enrichment test suite for serde, display, lattice, and boundary conditions

Add ~2200 lines of enrichment tests covering serde round-trip correctness,
Display/as_str agreement, lattice ordering, signing validation, error-code
stability, and boundary conditions across the extension host type system.

Coverage areas:

Capability:
- Serde round-trip for all 6 variants (FsRead, FsWrite, NetClient, HostCall,
  ProcessSpawn, Declassify)
- as_str/Display agreement and serde-to-as_str consistency
- implied_capabilities coverage (FsWrite implies FsRead, others empty)

ManifestTrustLevel:
- Serde round-trip for Development and SignedSupplyChain variants

ExtensionState:
- Serde round-trip for all 11 lifecycle states
- as_str/Display agreement and serde string stability

LifecycleTransition:
- Serde round-trip for all 11 transitions
- as_str/Display agreement verification

Additional type coverage:
- SecurityLabel serde round-trips (Public, Internal, Confidential, Restricted)
- IsolationLevel, DeclassifyPolicy, ResourceQuota, ExtensionManifest,
  QuarantineReason, DelegateCellDecision serialization stability
- CapabilityLattice ordering invariants (FsRead <= FsWrite, comparable
  capabilities, incomparable cross-domain capabilities)
- Manifest signature validation (valid HMAC-SHA256, tampered-manifest
  rejection, tampered-signature rejection)
- ErrorCode Display stability for all error variants
- Edge cases: empty manifests, zero quotas, maximum quotas, empty labels,
  empty delegate cell inputs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
